song_name: Bruce Springsteen - Im On Fire - Glory Days
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I’m On Fire

[Intro]
[ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                                                            [ch]D[/ch]
Hey, little girl is your daddy home? Did he go away and leave you all alone; humm[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
I got a bad desire, oh, oh, oh I'm on fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                                                                [ch]D[/ch]
Tell me now baby is he good to you and can he do to you the things that I do, oh no;[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
I can take you higher, oh, oh, oh I'm on fire[/tab]


[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Sometimes it's like someone took a knife baby, edgy and dull,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]F#m[/ch]
and cut a six inch valley through the middle of my skull[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]
At night I wake up with the sheets soaking wet,[/tab]
and a freight train running through the middle of my head;
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
only you, can cool my desire, oh, oh, oh I'm on fire[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, oh, oh I'm on fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, oh, oh I’m on….[/tab]

Glory Days

[ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Asus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
I had a friend was a big baseball player, back in high school[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                        [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
He could throw that speedball by ya, make you look like a fool boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                                                          [ch]D[/ch]
Saw him the other night at this roadside bar, I was walking in he was walking out[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]                                       [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
We went back inside, sat down, had a few drinks, but all we kept talking about[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Glory Days, well they'll pass you by[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Glory Days, in the wink of a young girl's eye[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Glory Days, glory days[/tab]


[Break]
[ch]E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]                           [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Think I'm going down to the well tonight and I'm gonna, drink till I get my fill[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]
And I hope when I get older I don't sit around thinking about it, but I probably will[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
Yeah just sitting back trying to recapture, a little of the glory of[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]E[/ch]                                                        [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
Well the time slips away, and leaves you with nothing, mister, but boring stories of[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Glory Days, yeah they'll pass you by[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
Glory Days, in the wink of a young girl's eye[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]
Glory Days, glory days[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
..., yeah they'll pass you by[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Glory Days, in the wink of a young girl's eye[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
Glory Days, glory days[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
All right  Ooh yeah[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
All right  Come one now[/tab]

Repeat and ad lib to end (15 total outro A D lines)
